{{Quote|Go home and beg your ''darna'' for death|Nil Spaar to Kol Attan|<ref name="Shield">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref>}}
'''Kol Attan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yevetha]] who served as the [[Proctor (Yevethan)|proctor of defense for the spawnworld]].<ref name="Shield" />

He was blamed for the destruction of the [[corvette]] ''[[Beauty of Yevetha]]'' by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[X-wing/Legends|X-wing]] pilot [[Rone Taggar]]. [[Nil Spaar]] declared him ''[[to-mara]]'', and refused him an honourable execution. Instead, he was told to seek a dishonourable [[Death/Legends|death]] at the hands of his own ''[[darna]]''.<ref name="Shield" />

He was replaced as proctor of defense by [[Tho Voota]].<ref name="Test">''[[Tyrant's Test]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
